body.title: [sprint] BUG: slates write to ~/.unseen_university/claudecode, not devlab/runtime/memory/slates
body.description:
**Problem:** Slates are written to `~/.unseen_university/claudecode/*.slate.txt` (60 files) — which is OUTSIDE the repo and therefore NOT git-backed. The stated intention is that all dev-process artifacts live under `devlab/runtime/memory/`, and slates specifically in `devlab/runtime/memory/slates/`. That canonical dir exists but is EMPTY (only `.gitkeep`, 0 slates imported) — so we are not following our own rule yet. Worse, slate state has fragmented into THREE old locations under `~/.unseen_university/`: `claudecode/*.slate.txt` (60, active `.txt`), `slate/*.slate.md` (5, `.md`), `slates/*.md` (3). The skills (savestate, context-load, day-close, sorted, recover) and ~19 py refs all hardcode `${IGOR_HOME:-~/.unseen_university}/claudecode/` for the slate path.

**Proposed shape:** (1) Add ONE canonical slate-path resolver that returns `<repo_root>/devlab/runtime/memory/slates/YYYYMMDD.slate.txt` (using uu_root()). (2) Update the skills + py refs to use it. (3) Migrate the existing slates from the 3 old locations into the canonical dir (verify byte-identical copies). (4) ONLY AFTER the resolver is switched AND copies verified, delete the originals to prevent confusion. Order matters: deleting before the skills are switched is whack-a-mole (next session recreates them at the old path) and risks losing non-git-backed live data.

**Affected files:** central slate-path helper (new, e.g. in unseen_university/ or devlab/claudecode/); skills savestate/context-load/day-close/sorted/recover SKILL.md; ~19 py refs constructing `claudecode/...slate.txt` (grep `\.slate\.txt`); a one-shot migration script.
**Design rules:** filesystem-memory-store (devlab/runtime/memory is the dev-process home, git-backed); External State Principle. Do NOT touch TheIgors archives (~/.TheIgors, ~/TheIgorsProject) — intentional per memory.
**Scope boundary:** IN — canonical resolver + skill/code switch + migrate the 3 ~/.unseen_university slate locations into devlab/runtime/memory/slates/ + delete-originals-after-verify. OUT — TheIgors/TheIgorsProject archives; slate JSON-format change (that is T-slate-narrative-log); reconciling .txt vs .md format (pick .txt, note the .md stragglers).
**Test plan:** After switch: savestate/context-load create+read the slate under devlab/runtime/memory/slates/; assert nothing new is written to ~/.unseen_university/claudecode/; assert migrated slates present + git-tracked. Migration script idempotent (re-run = no-op).
